## Checklist

- [ ] I read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] If I touched parsers, I added regression tests to `scripts/test_reconcile_parsing.py` (or a new test file).
- [ ] If I changed a file format, I updated `references/protocol-spec.md`.
- [ ] If I changed a rule, I updated `templates/POLIS_CONSTITUTION.md` (and `SKILL.md` if relevant).
- [ ] `python3 scripts/test_reconcile_parsing.py` still passes.
